title: Full moon walk at Valley of Desolation
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School's full moon walk recently was all it promised and more.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School's full moon walk recently was all it promised and more."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"More than 100 people of all ages joined the event, which was in support of Union High."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When they arrived, the participants were greeted by a spectacular golden hour. The sky was painted with warm hues, creating a perfect backdrop for the evening.","html":"When they arrived, the participants were greeted by a spectacular golden hour. The sky was painted with warm hues, creating a perfect backdrop for the evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All participants were shuttled up by bus to Graaff Reinet’s personal pride and joy, the Valley of Desolation.","html":"All participants were shuttled up by bus to Graaff Reinet’s personal pride and joy, the Valley of Desolation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While waiting for everyone to arrive, many took a short hike to the viewing area. From the deck, everybody enjoyed a breathtaking sunset.","html":"While waiting for everyone to arrive, many took a short hike to the viewing area. From the deck, everybody enjoyed a breathtaking sunset."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the sun set and the moon shone in all its glory, they set off on the almost 9km trek down to the bottom.","html":"As the sun set and the moon shone in all its glory, they set off on the almost 9km trek down to the bottom."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From the path they had a spectacular view of the town below.","html":"From the path they had a spectacular view of the town below."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nature's night sounds accompanied the walkers, adding to the magic of the evening.An hour and a half later, everyone had completed the route.","html":"Nature's night sounds accompanied the walkers, adding to the magic of the evening.
An hour and a half later, everyone had completed the route."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It will remain a beautiful memory for everyone who took part in this exhilarating experience.","html":"It will remain a beautiful memory for everyone who took part in this exhilarating experience."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union High extends its heartfelt gratitude to SANParks for allowing the school to host this event in the park.","html":"Union High extends its heartfelt gratitude to SANParks for allowing the school to host this event in the park."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union High facilitator Bronwen Langmead organised the event with the Culture Department and many parents assisted with registration and transportation for the participants.","html":"Union High facilitator Bronwen Langmead organised the event with the Culture Department and many parents assisted with registration and transportation for the participants."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Full moon walk at Valley of Desolation
